servinfo.title: Secondary Pulley Speed Sensor Removal and Installation

attention3.ptxt: Be careful not to drop washer when removing and installing secondary pulley speed sensor.

s1.ptxt: Remove battery and battery tray with ECM.
Disconnect connector from secondary pulley speed sensor.
Remove secondary pulley speed sensor (1) from transaxle.

servinfosub.title: Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Primary Pulley Speed Sensor and Secondary Pulley Speed Sensor Inspection

servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Apply CVT fluid to new O-ring of sensor.
Tighten secondary pulley speed sensor bolt (2) to specified torque.
Connect connector and fix wire harness with clamp securely.
